verbGlossary.PHOTOGRAPHS: {source}captured by photo documenting a field condition, {target}, or incident
verbGlossary.CAPTURES: {source}recording of a field event, {target}, or incident for the project record
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}log entry that records the occurrence of a quality or {target}
verbGlossary.REMEDIATES: {source} created to systematically correct {target}, violation, or deficiency
verbGlossary.RESOLVES: {source}that directly addresses and closes out a quality or safety issue
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source}that initiates a formal document request or notice
verbGlossary.REFERENCES: {source} that cites or points to a specific quality/{target} or vice versa for context
verbGlossary.CLOSES OUT: {source}record that formally completes and closes {target} or issue
verbGlossary.GOVERNS: {source}, plan, or regulatory document that sets the acceptance standard an {target} or observation is measured against
verbGlossary.ATTACHES: {source} or product data record appended to a test report as supporting evidence
verbGlossary.SUBSTANTIATES: {source} or sample that provides material proof supporting an {target} or test finding
verbGlossary.ATTACHES TO: Quality or {target} that includes linked photo or document evidence in its file
verbGlossary.POPULATES: {source}that feed into and compose the punch list document for closeout
verbGlossary.ESCALATES TO: {source}, {target}, or deficiency formally elevated via written correspondence or notice
verbGlossary.DIRECTS: {source} that orders specific {target} or remediation in the field
verbGlossary.RESPONDS TO: {source} issued in direct response to a field {target}, non-conformance, or coordination issue
verbGlossary.SUPERSEDES: {source}that overrides the design basis that caused {target}
verbGlossary.TRACKS: {source} that record status updates and follow-up on open quality or {target}s
verbGlossary.REVIEWS: {source} session where {target}s, safety findings, or deficiencies are formally discussed
verbGlossary.RECORDED ON: {source} statement or {target} result entered on a standardized project form
verbGlossary.REQUIRES: {source}document that mandates a specific {target} before work can proceed
verbGlossary.SATISFIES: {source}{target} that fulfills a permit or regulatory requirement
verbGlossary.COVERS: {source}that provides financial coverage for an {target} or claim
verbGlossary.DELIVERS: {source} that formally sends a test report or certification to the project team
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS: {source}document (as-built or warranty) that verifies {target} resolution or system performance is complete
verbGlossary.INCORPORATES: O&M manual that includes system performance test results as part of the turnover package
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS: {source} that creates a trackable project task for a responsible party
verbGlossary.TEMPLATES: {source} template that structures the format for recording {target} activity
verbGlossary.INDICATES: {source} management metric that serves as a leading or lagging signal for a quality/safety rate
verbGlossary.VERIFIES: {source} or third-party review that confirms {target} or submittal meets requirements
verbGlossary.MIRRORS: {source}plan that corresponds one-to-one with a documents-domain action plan record
verbGlossary.DEPENDS ON: {source} milestone (such as lien waiver release) that requires a quality/safety resolution first
